module.name: balloon
module.description: A chat/speech balloon with a speaker avatar (image or initial) and name; the body is the spoken message. Left/right direction places the avatar and tail.
module.aiSpec:
Show a chat/speech balloon with a speaker avatar and name — ideal for dialogues, Q&A, or persona quotes. Block module: the body is the spoken message (ordinary markdown). For a back-and-forth conversation, stack several @balloon blocks and alternate `direction`. For a free-floating callout with a pointing tail use @bubble instead; for a titled panel use @card.
Parameters: - direction (select: left | right, default left): which side the avatar and tail sit on. - name (text, default "User"): speaker name shown under the avatar; its first letter is the fallback avatar initial. - image (image, default empty): avatar image URL/path or @alias; when empty a colored initial circle is used. - bubblecolor (color, default empty = theme: light grey on left, light green on right): overrides the bubble fill AND its tail color. - avatarcolor (color, default empty = theme: accent on left, green on right): overrides the initial-circle background. - textcolor (color, default empty = #333): message text color. - fontsize (CSS length, default 1em): message text size, e.g. 0.9em or 18px.
Usage: <!-- @balloon direction: right, name: Support, bubblecolor: #e0f2fe --> Yes, we can absolutely meet that deadline. <!-- @end -->

param.name: direction
param.label: Direction
param.desc: Side the avatar and speech tail sit on.

param.name: name
param.label: Name
param.desc: Speaker name; first letter is the fallback avatar initial.

param.name: image
param.label: Avatar
param.desc: URL/path or @alias; empty = colored initial circle.

param.name: bubblecolor
param.label: Bubble color
param.desc: Overrides the bubble fill and tail; blank = theme default.

param.name: textcolor
param.label: Text color
param.desc: Message text color; blank = default dark grey.

param.name: fontsize
param.label: Text size
param.desc: CSS size for the message, e.g. 0.9em or 18px.

snippet.label: Speech Balloon
snippet.text: <!-- @balloon direction: left, name: Client --> Is it really possible to implement this requirement by this week? <!-- @end -->
snippet.description: Interactive speech balloon with adjustable left/right direction.

snippet.label: Speech Balloon (Image)
snippet.text: <!-- @balloon direction: right, name: Support, image: https://via.placeholder.com/150 --> Yes, we can absolutely meet that deadline. <!-- @end -->
snippet.description: Speech balloon with a custom avatar image.
